emergency_fallback: a technician will call back within 30 minutes
non_emergency_routing_rules: take a message and call back the next morning
integration_constraints: don't book any jobs automatically, all bookings require manual review
after_hours_flow_summary: take a message for non-emergencies, route emergencies to on-call plumbers
questions_or_unknowns: office hours flow summary not fully specified
call transfer retries and failure handling not specified
notes: be warm and friendly, don't put people on hold for more than 30 seconds, always ask the caller if they're a new or existing customer
